_comment: Renderer sprite data for all items that have an equipped/worn appearance. All paths relative to assets/. Poses listed under available_poses are the only ones this item has sprites for — if the current player state uses a pose not in that list, fall back: h_run→run, h_axe→axe, h_pistol→pistol, h_twohand→twohand. Clothing items (vest/helmet/pants/top/footwear/backpack) go on the 'equipped_clothing' render layer. Weapons/melee go on 'equipped_held'. h_ prefix = holstered (secondary slot visible while primary active).
